capture_command: strings /Users/bellman/.local/share/claude/versions/2.1.152 | grep -E 'CronList|buildCronListPrompt|List all cron jobs|List scheduled cron jobs' + https://code.claude.com/docs/en/scheduled-tasks
description: List all cron jobs scheduled via CronCreate in this session. Each entry includes the 8-character id, the 5-field cron expression, the prompt, the recurring flag, and a human-readable cadence. Returns an empty list with 'No scheduled jobs' when nothing is scheduled.
observed_returns: Populated: array of { id: 8-char string, cron: '5-field expression', recurring: boolean, prompt: string, humanSchedule: string }
notes: Source-of-truth strings extracted verbatim from the local claude binary: var yM_="CronList"; jW8="List scheduled cron jobs"; buildCronListPrompt contains the full prompt block.
CronList takes no parameters. The output enumerates all session-scoped scheduled tasks (and durable jobs when durable cron is enabled).
